features: STRONG; HEALTHY SMILES: Keep your smile white; healthy and protected when you brush with Colgate Total Whitening Toothpaste.

BACTERIAL DEFENCE: Our teeth whitening toothpaste is designed to give you stronger 24-hour bacterial defence* for your whole mouth! (*Superior bacterial reduction on teeth, tongue cheeks & gums vs non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste with 2x daily continued use after 4 weeks.)

SUPERIOR BACTERIAL REDUCTION*: Besides giving you superior* bacterial reduction on your teeth, tongue, cheeks and gums*, our teeth whitening toothpaste also gives you long-lasting active protection*. (*Superior bacterial reduction on teeth, tongue cheeks & gums vs non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste with 2x daily continued use after 4 weeks.)
STAIN REMOVAL: Our whitening toothpaste effectively removes surface stains to help keep your smile naturally white.

8 BENEFITS: Our teeth whitening toothpaste helps to protect from cavities, plaque, tartar and sensitivity while protecting your gums and enamel, and helping to whiten your teeth and give you confident fresh breath.
DISCLAIMERS: *vs. non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste, with 3 months continued use.
description: Product Description Colgate Total Whitening Toothpaste offers 8 benefits for complete protection. The teeth whitening toothpaste, with dual zinc antibacterial technology, offers lasting protection for healthy smiles. Ingredients Glycerin, Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Arginine, Aroma, Cellulose Gum, Zinc Oxide, Benzyl Alcohol, Poloxamer 407, Zinc Citrate, Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate, Xanthan Gum, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Phosphoric Acid, Sucralose, CI 74160. Contains: Sodium Fluoride Total Fluoride content: 1450 ppm Directions Apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to a toothbrush, brush in circular motions for 2 minutes, covering all teeth surfaces, then rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes. If swallowed, seek medical advice. See more
